vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #902

plan.title: Fresh Windows maintainer setup has no scripted toolchain bootstrap or PATH-refresh helper

narratives.Description: Fresh Windows maintainer setup has no scripted toolchain bootstrap or PATH-refresh helper

references.title: Issue #902: Fresh Windows maintainer setup has no scripted toolchain bootstrap or PATH-refresh helper

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Urgent fixes to land ahead of broader roadmap work -- adoption blockers and bugs that block consumer adoption or successful first-session UX.

x-swarm-guidance.rationale: Adds scripts/setup_windows.ps1 (idempotent winget bootstrap for go/python/uv/task/gh) + scripts/refresh-path.ps1 (registry PATH merge) + tasks/setup.yml task setup:toolchain + CONTRIBUTING.md Windows quickstart. Shares the registry-PATH-refresh primitive with #899's Go-side refreshPathFromRegistry() -- both should read from HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\Environment\Path + HKCU\Environment\Path.
